case_title: DA VINCI GROUP vs. QUEVEDO, RICHARD et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF DA VINCI GROUP AS TO DEFENDANT QUEVEDO, RICHARD
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT QUEVEDO, RICHARD

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DA VINCI GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUEVEDO, RICHARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 731 FLORIDA ST, #103 S.F, CA
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT QUEVEDO, RICHARD
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $23.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DA VINCI GROUP
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DA VINCI GROUP AS TO DEFENDANT QUEVEDO, RICHARD DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DA VINCI GROUP SERVED OCT-06-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT QUEVEDO, RICHARD
